tools.name: search_news
tools.description: Search ThinkPattern's multi-source news coverage and return the most relevant stories as grounded cards: headline, short summary, the outlets reporting it, how many independent outlets covered it, when it was first reported, and a link to the full story. Coverage is refreshed continuously with sever

tools.name: get_latest_news
tools.description: Return the stories ThinkPattern is tracking right now, most significant first, optionally filtered to one topic. Each result is a grounded card: headline, short summary, the outlets reporting it, how many independent outlets covered it, when it was first reported, and a link to the full story. This
